chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2186 of 2022 ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 17.08.2022 Syed Nadeem-ul.Haque advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with Mr. Shakeel Baig, Assistant Superintendent CP Hyderabad. ----- Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the petition at some length submits that most of the cases pending against the petitioner have been transferred to Karachi so also his custody; however, there are still four cases pending against him in Hyderabad which the trial court may be directed to conduct through video link. We are of the view that this request be better considered by the trial court first keeping in view its resources and availability of such provision where the petitioner shall move a proper application, which, if filed, shall be decided within a short possible time preferably within a week. Petition stands disposed of in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
